overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a racing simulator showing nighttime highway driving in heavy rain. The player navigates an Audi through multi-lane traffic, passing through tunnels and underpasses while windshield wipers maintain visibility against the downpour.

overtaking a white sedan traveling in the right lane

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a multi-lane highway at night with light rain. The driver navigates an Audi at high speed as rain intensifies around the 5-second mark, activating the windshield wipers. The camera overtakes a white sedan while metal guardrails line both sides of the asphalt road, illuminated by overhead street lamps.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a highway tunnel around 18 seconds, transitioning from open rain to a sheltered concrete passage with artificial lighting. The sky becomes obscured by the tunnel ceiling as the driver follows a truck ahead. At 24 seconds, the vehicle exits back into the rainy night.

passing under a concrete overpass bridge structure

metal guardrail on the right side

segments.scene_description: Back on the open highway in heavy rain, the vehicle passes a red sedan and drives under a concrete overpass. Urban buildings become visible on the left horizon through the rain, while street lamps and guardrails line the road. The segment ends as the vehicle approaches a second tunnel entrance.

exiting the second tunnel back into open rainy conditions

left concrete wall of the second tunnel

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a second highway tunnel around 42 seconds, again becoming sheltered from the rain. The concrete walls and ceiling create an enclosed environment with artificial lighting. After a brief passage, the vehicle exits back into the open highway at 47.5 seconds.

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle exiting the second tunnel and continuing on the open highway in heavy rain. A tall concrete sound barrier wall lines the right side while the vehicle overtakes a green sports car. Street lamps and guardrails continue into the distance as the drive proceeds through the rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed drive through a rainy nighttime highway that repeatedly transitions between open, storm-swept roads and sheltered concrete tunnels. It begins on a multi-lane asphalt road under street lamps, where light rain quickly intensifies into a downpour that triggers the windshield wipers as the Audi overtakes a white sedan. The environment then shifts from the open air into the artificial glow of a highway tunnel, following a truck through the enclosed passage before emerging back into the heavy rain to pass a red sedan and drive under a concrete overpass. As urban buildings appear on the horizon, the camera glides into a second tunnel, momentarily shielding the vehicle from the storm within concrete walls. Finally, the scene opens back onto the highway, where the vehicle overtakes a green sports car alongside a tall concrete sound barrier wall as the drive continues into the rainy night.
